title: Kayden  lite
description: It is a texture pack for pvp, having a little bit of the 1.8 style, it is in development and this would be a first look.
body:
this is a texture pack that uses different pvp recursor, and a little bit to be useful and it has some things that you can't see in the images, it's in development
___________________________________________________________________________________________________
![XP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf69161b5beb779995640eeeb769433fa9c3e8a4_0.webp)



___________________________________________________________________________________________________

**how to place in minecraft**

Download Kayden lite.zip

Go to %appdata%.

Copy Kayden lite.zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks

Load Minecraft and select the texture pack 

___________________________________________________________________________________________________
